roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2
PEOPLE'S Motion to Continue THE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING
REQ ADD TO CRIMINAL CALENDAR FOR MODIFICATION OF CPO - FILED

/CAL:MODIFICATION OF CPO/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY IN SOLANO COUNTY/X:APPEARING VIA ZOOM IS  VICTIM, WANDA MACK/X:VICTIM IS VOIR DIRE BY THE PEOPLE/X:KIMBERLY RODRIGUEZ, VICTIM ADVOCATE,APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/X:MOTION TO CONTINUE THE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING FILED BY THE PEOPLE,/MO GRTD/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:PAROLEE ADMITS TO VIOLATIONS #1 AND #3,/3000REIN/PAJ:135 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR32 DAYS, NO TIME LOST,/4019HALF/X:TREATMENT TO BE DETERMINED BY PAROLE,//SA5:WANDA MACK AND ELIZABETH CARNEY (AKA MITCHELL)/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/X:THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION IN REGARDS TO THE PROTECTIVE ORDER,/X:THIS MATTER MAY BE ADDED BACK TO CALENDAR TO MODIFY THE PROTECTIVE ORDER,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE REMAINING VIOLATIONS IS GRANTED,/

/CAL:PAROLE PHC, 4011,6/X:MICHAEL MENESINI APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/X: PAROLEAGENT JUSTIN LUGAR AND PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM,/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:PAROLE HEARING DATE IS CONFIRMED,/CTORD:WANDA MACK, DOB 3-7-85, PRESENT FOR 2-3-22 HEARING DATE/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/PDP/WIAPTR/X:PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/CTORD:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/4011,5/TEXT:CRTORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:01-18-22/S14/CONTD:RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PTR HEARINGAT 9 AM AND PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING AT 130 PM/
/CAL:MODIFICATION OF CPO/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/SATERM/SA1:ELIZABETH CARNEY  AKA  MITCHELL/SAORD3/SAORD/
